44.code: print(root, 1);  // 从根节点开始的深度为1
44.reason: [The traversal order is preorder, but the problem requires outputting leaf nodes from left to right, which corresponds to inorder traversal. Using preorder may not visit leaves in left-to-right order in all cases.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The traversal order is preorder, but the problem requires outputting leaf nodes from left to right, which corresponds to inorder traversal. Using preorder may not visit leaves in left-to-right order in all cases.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The traversal order in the `print` function is pre-order, but the problem requires outputting leaf nodes from left to right, which corresponds to in-order traversal. Using pre-order may not visit leaves in strict left-to-right (in-order) sequence when the tree is unbalanced.]
